reviews.review_description: I read and watched the clip and thought “maybe” but I assure you- don’t do it. you will lag through the map for 5 minutes and have to reset the game; you will get bored of the hallow enemies in  a few minutes and the entire thing just lacks depth. just dont

whoever said this game is better than superfly is a bigfat LIE. just as well the price is reduced....i really enjoy flying games like RUSH, Superfly etc.hope it gets updated or sumething cos it could be much better....
......... serious potential
I’ve tried all the hero games but the destruction physics and swinging really set this one apart love it keep it up
